name: Zheng Da (Wenxin)
page_title: Zheng Da (Wenxin) 鄭達 (文信) [Han] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives

sections.details:

	鄭達 (文信)


	 Pronunciation

	 Pinyin (Tones) 
	Zhèng Dá (Wénxìn)

	 Birthplace

	 Other Names 
	Zheng Kui (鄭逵)
sections.biography-source-undefined:
Zheng Da, styled Wenxin, was from Pingyi commandery. He once served as a Palace Attendant. Throughout his life, he received many offers to work in the court, but he declined them all. During the Zhongping era, he acquainted himself with Yan Gan and Li Yi, who came from poor families but were talented. In 189, He Jin petitioned for Zheng Da to become a mid-level official.

《三輔決錄》曰：鄭達字文信。累辟不就。大將何進表為從事中郎。

full_text:
Zheng Da (Wenxin) 鄭達 (文信)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zheng Da (鄭達), styledWenxin (文信), was born in Pingyi commandery. Palace Attendant. Refused many appointments. Zheng Da was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.

Zheng Da, styled Wenxin, was from Pingyi commandery. He once served as a Palace Attendant. Throughout his life, he received many offers to work in the court, but he declined them all. During the Zhongping era, he acquainted himself with Yan Gan and Li Yi, who came from poor families but were talented. In 189, He Jin petitioned for Zheng Da to become a mid-level official.
《三輔決錄》曰：鄭達字文信。累辟不就。大將何進表為從事中郎。
